target_section_name: 高等教育提质扩容的必然逻辑
diagnosis:
Section has known issues: 1) 三个子论点之间的逻辑递进关系不够清晰——"应然→实然→质量旨归"的论证链条在"实然"部分转向了风险描述而非正向论证
2) 引用文献较旧（主要引用2019-2024年政策文件），缺乏国际比较视角的最新研究
3) 第二小节"实然之困"的篇幅比重过大（约占全文1/3），与前后两小节的论证比例失衡
4) 核心概念"提质扩容"在政策话语与学术话语之间的转换不够充分——直接使用了政策术语但未做学理化界定. Prioritize addressing these before expansion.
revision_priorities: Add supporting citations for each claim
suggested_structure:
高等教育提质扩容的必然逻辑
1. Opening context (2-3 paragraphs)
2. Core argument (3-5 paragraphs)
3. Evidence and examples
4. Counter-arguments addressed
5. Transition to next section
argument_continuity_notes: Argument has 3 steps. Check logical flow between each step.
citation_or_evidence_needs: Each factual claim needs a citation
privacy_limitations: Section content was reviewed in sanitized form
Review scope is limited to sanitized excerpt
next_recommended_human_action: Review diagnosis and revision priorities. Apply changes to the original section.
